booking.title: Book a court | PADEL2GO – Find your location
booking.description: Pick your PADEL2GO location and book your next padel court in seconds.

location.descriptionTemplate: Book your padel court at {{name}} with PADEL2GO.

checkout.title: Checkout | PADEL2GO
checkout.description: Pay for your padel court booking securely with Stripe.

success.title: Payment successful | PADEL2GO
success.description: Your padel court booking has been paid successfully.

landing.heading: Choose your
landing.intro: Find a PADEL2GO court near you and book your slot.
landing.adminPreviewDescription: You can see the courts, regular users currently see "Coming soon". Toggle under Admin → Features.
landing.comingSoonDescription: Our courts are still in the final testing phase. We'll open bookings shortly – check back soon!

location.adminPreviewDescription: You can see this page, regular users currently see "Coming soon".
location.comingSoonDescription: Our courts are still in the final testing phase. Bookings will open shortly.

guestUpsell.title: Earn points & more benefits
guestUpsell.body: With a free account you collect P2G Credits, can invite friends and manage your bookings.

fallback.info: If the payment page doesn't open automatically:

footnote.free: Your booking will be confirmed free of charge – no payment required.
footnote.secure: Secure payment. Your booking will be confirmed once payment succeeds.

success.title: Payment successful!
success.description: Your booking is confirmed. You'll receive a confirmation email at your address on file.

lobby.title: Turn it into a lobby
lobby.body: Invite friends or make the court public — other players can join for free.

guestInfo.title: P2G Credits & more benefits
guestInfo.body: Sign up for free to earn points on every booking, invite friends and manage your bookings online.

cancel.title: Payment cancelled
cancel.description: The payment was cancelled. Your reservation is still held for a short while – feel free to try again.

errors.name: Please enter your name
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address

guestModal.title: Continue as guest
guestModal.description: Enter your contact details. You'll receive a confirmation by email.

slotPicker.noSlots: No slots available for this date.

summary.title: Booking summary
summary.lobbyDescEnabled: You pay for the whole court. Invited friends & players who join play for free.
summary.noPricesConfigured: No prices have been configured for this court yet.
